Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Class PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableValidator<PrimitiveCharacterValidator,Character>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<PrimitiveCharacterValidator,Character>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<PrimitiveCharacterValidator,Character>, ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator<PrimitiveCharacterValidator,Character>, PrimitiveCharacterValidator
public final class PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl extends AbstractComparableValidator<PrimitiveCharacterValidator,Character> implements PrimitiveCharacterValidator
Default implementation of PrimitiveCharacterValidator.

  • Constructor Details

    • PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl

      public PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, char actual, List<ValidationFailure> failures, boolean fatalFailure)
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      name - the name of the value
      actual - the actual value
      failures - the list of validation failures
      fatalFailure - true if validation stopped as the result of a fatal failure
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if scope, config, name or failures are null. If name is blank.
